lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, what's a little boy like you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Weve
lines.text: I ain't no little boy. Me dad, Steve, said I was big enough to take care of these 'ere wyverns, as the pal- palint-palintililiolog- those blokes from the museum are too scared of them.

lines.speaker: Weve
lines.text: Yeah, whatever. I know how to look after myself, my entire family are slayer guardians or something like that.

lines.speaker: Weve
lines.text: To guard the wyverns of course.

lines.speaker: Weve
lines.text: From people like you who just want to kill 'em.

lines.speaker: Weve
lines.text: They have lives too. They were created for a purpose. But whatever, you can only kill these ones if the Slayer Masters say you can.

lines.speaker: Weve
lines.text: Well, it's kinda a family tradition you might say. Plus I'm good at looking after wyverns and fast enough to weave between their legs and not get hurt.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't an assigned slayer task

lines.speaker: Weve
lines.text: Hey! Leave them alone! My dad Steve will beat you up unless a Slayer Master has given you special permission.
